Private Jets </li></ul></div><h1 class="main-title">Private Jets for Sale</h1><h2 class="main-sub-title"><p>Private jet planes offer five major advantages over commercial jets - privacy, efficiency, luxury, security and flexibility. Perfect for today&#39;s busy CEO. The leading companies offering new and used private jets for sale are<a href="https://www.avbuyer.com/aircraft/private-jets/bombardier-challenger">&nbsp;Bombardier Challenger</a>, <a href="https://www.avbuyer.com/aircraft/private-jets/bombardier-global">Global</a> &amp; <a href="https://www.avbuyer.com/aircraft/private-jets/bombardier-learjet">Learjet</a>, <a href="https://www.avbuyer.com/aircraft/private-jets/dassault-falcon">Dassault Falcon</a>, <a href="https://www.avbuyer.com/aircraft/private-jets/embraer">Embraer</a>, <a href="https://www.avbuyer.com/aircraft/private-jets/gulfstream">Gulfstream Aerospace</a> and Textron<a href="https://www.avbuyer.com/aircraft/private-jets/cessna-citation">&nbsp;(Cessna&nbsp;</a>and <a href="https://www.avbuyer.com/aircraft/private-jets/beechcraft">Beechcraft)</a>.<br><br><br></p></h2><div class="text-center read-more-dtl" ><a href="#" class="read-more">Read More</a></div><div class="multi-search hide"><a href="/sell-my-aircraft" id="post_ad_btn" class="button dark-green-btn"><span class="speaker-icon"></span> Advertise Your Aircraft Now</a></div></div></div><div id="item_search_location_modal" class="reveal" data-reveal><h2 class="modal-title">

The metrics support that AvBuyer is the right choice for the international aircraft broker to sell one's plane."</p><div class="post-name">Janine K. Iannarelli, Par Avion</div></div><div class="slide"><p>"Fantastic service! From scheduling monthly print ads and email broadcasting to cataloging enquiries -- the AvBuyer team is always great to work with, very responsive, and manages our account wonderfully. Lise, Emma, Linda, Mark, Sally, and everyone at AvBuyer – thank you for being a great aviation business partner!"</p><div class="post-name">Kristin Ritchie, The Ritchie Group</div></div><div class="slide"><p>"When it comes to aviation intelligence, only one name comes to mind: AvBuyer. From their monthly publication to their vast online advertising services, AvBuyer possesses the expertise and deep understanding of our target audience, making them instrumental in helping aircraft find their next home."</p><div class="post-name">Ricky Gioconda, flyExclusive</div></div><div class="slide"><p>''We have enjoyed working with AvBuyer for many years and truly honor the personal and excellent customer support they offer.''</p><div class="post-name">Thomas Wieser, Vienna Jets</div></div><div class="slide"><p>"We receive the most inquiries and qualified leads from our advertising with AvBuyer. Your team is always a pleasure to work with!"</p><div class="post-name">East Coast Jet Center Inc</div></div></div><a href="/magazines/avbuyer/advertising" class="button blue-btn">Find out more about Alert me by email for new listings of <b>Private Jets</b></div></div><div class="large-6 cell"><div class="input-group"><input type="email" id="alert_me2" name="alert_me2" placeholder="Email"><div class="input-group-button"><button id="submit_alert_me2" name="submit_alert_me2" class="alert_me_button button expanded blue-btn" type="submit" value="Submit" disabled><span class=right-arrow-white></span></button></div></div></div><div class="large-6 cell"><div class="" data-closable="" id="success_alert2"></div></div></div></form><div class="close-btn"><button class="model-close-btn hide-for-large" aria-label="Dismiss alert" type="button" data-close="" id="alert-close"><span aria-hidden="true">Close</span></button></div></div><div class="grid-x align-middle list-paging"><div class="large-4 cell show-for-large showing-page">Showing 1 - 20 of 507</div><div class="large-8 cell"><div class="pagination-wrap"><ul class="pagination" role="navigation" aria-label="Pagination"><li class="pagination-previous disabled" >Previous<span class="show-for-sr">page</span></li><li class="current">1<span class="show-for-sr">You're on page</span></li><li><a href="/aircraft/private-jets/page-2" >2</a></li><li><a href="/aircraft/private-jets/page-3" >3</a></li><li><a href="/aircraft/private-jets/page-4" >4</a></li><li class="ellipsis"></li><li><a href="/aircraft/private-jets/page-26" >26</a></li><li class="pagination-next"><a href="/aircraft/private-jets/page-2" rel="next">Next<span class="show-for-sr">page</span></a></li></ul></div></div></div><!-- Dealer Enquiry --></div></div><div class="faq-private-jet"><div class="faq-head"><h2>FAQs: Private Jets for Sale</h2></div><div class="sky-blue-head">Here are the most Frequently Asked Questions for Private Jets for sale</div><ul class="fa-no-bullet"><li><h4 class="faq-question">How much is a private Jet?</h4><p class="faq-answer">In today&#039;s market most jets would fall into the range of between US$30 million and US$5 million. At the top end of the Large Jet market, a 2024-model Gulfstream G700 costs US$80.0m, per Aircraft Bluebook’s Summer 2024 data, whereas a 2023-model single-engine Cirrus SF50 Gen 2+ VisionJet in the Very Light Jet category costs US$3.5m. On the used aircraft market, there are various examples of older jets having depreciated to below $2m, and even less than $1m following several years of depreciation.</p></li><li><h4 class="faq-question">How many private jets are there in the world today?</h4><p class="faq-answer">There are 24,270 private jets in operation worldwide (JETNET, July 2024). Approximately 63% of the world’s private jets are registered in the United States.</p></li><li><h4 class="faq-question">Are private jets more efficient than the airlines?</h4><p class="faq-answer">Private jets access around 10 times more airports in the US than scheduled airlines (around 5000 airports versus 500 airports) giving them access to remote communities without airline service. Moreover, 38% of Business Aviation missions involve stopping at more than one destination, according to NBAA.</p></li><li><h4 class="faq-question">How successful are private jet owners?</h4><p class="faq-answer">Business aircraft users out-perform non-users by 23% in revenue growth.
Two-thirds of passengers say they are more productive aboard their business jets than in the office.
</p></li></ul></div><div class="jet-overview" id="jet-overview"><h2 dir="ltr" style="line-height: 1.38; margin-top: 18pt; margin-bottom: 6pt; text-align: center;"><span style="font-size: 18px; color: rgb(44, 130, 201);">Private Jets Overview</span></h2><p dir="ltr" style="text-align: center;"><span style="font-size: 14px; color: rgb(209, 174, 99);"><strong>By Gerrard Cowen - Editor, Aircraft Reviews</strong></span></p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="color: rgb(44, 130, 201);"><strong>What are the Key Advantages of Private Jets?</strong></span></p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="color: rgb(44, 130, 201);"><strong>Privacy</strong></span>: Flying on your company jet means travelling with your work colleagues, working privately and without distraction en-route if needed.&nbsp;</p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="color: rgb(44, 130, 201);"><strong>Security:</strong></span> Traveling only with known-colleagues, friends and family, private jet users enjoy a higher level of security while flying. And, Business Aviation operators are required to meet the same high standards of security as the airlines. This is done without the queues and crowds associated with airline terminals,which also saves time and hassle.&nbsp;</p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="color: rgb(44, 130, 201);"><strong>Luxury:</strong></span> Flying aboard a private jet brings a high level of luxury and comfort, ensuring you arrive at your destination fresh and ready for business. Longer-range jets incorporate seats that transform into beds and some even include an on board shower. Even the smallest luxury private jets for sale have interiors equivalent to those of high-end sports utility vehicles. Cabin altitude pressures tend to be impressive, and noise levels in today&rsquo;s modern private jet plane cabins are also very low, enabling passengers to rest, work, and communicate in a luxurious environment.</p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="color: rgb(44, 130, 201);"><strong>Flexibility:</strong></span> With a private plane, you control your own schedule. With almost 40% of Business Aviation missions involving multiple stops, it&rsquo;s clear that users enjoy more flexibility and better productivity than if they were restricted to the schedule and destinations of an airline.</p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><span style="color: rgb(44, 130, 201);"><strong>Efficiency:</strong></span> Similarly, with aircraft able to access the remote communities the airlines don&rsquo;t, private jet passengers can get closer to where they need to go, reducing their overall time away from the home or office while maximizing the productivity of their time. Meanwhile, the cabins of private jet planes are usually equipped with excellent and secure connectivity solutions, ensuring passengers stay connected to the ground to enhance their en route efficiency and take care of other business as they travel.</p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:12pt;margin-bottom:12pt;"><strong><span style="color: rgb(44, 130, 201);">More Jets Information:</span></strong></p><p>Read the latest <a href="https://www.avbuyer.com/articles/jets-comparison" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Jet Comparison articles</a> by Mike Chase.&nbsp;</p><p>Read the latest <a href="https://www.avbuyer.com/articles/jets-prices-guides" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Jet Prices Guides&nbsp;</a>and <a href="https://www.avbuyer.com/articles/jets-buyers-guides" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Jet Buyer Guides.</a><a href="https://www.avbuyer.com/articles/jets-buyers-guides" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"></a><span style="color: rgb(44, 130, 201);"><a href="https://www.avbuyer.com/articles/jets-buyers-guides" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"></a><a href="https://www.avbuyer.com/articles/jets-buyers-guides" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"></a><em><a href="https://www.avbuyer.com/articles/jets-buyers-guides" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"></a></em></span></p><p><span style="color: rgb(44, 130, 201);"><em><em><span style="color: rgb(209, 174, 99);"><span style="color: rgb(44, 130, 201);"><em>With over 25 years of trading, AvBuyer is the primary marketplace for private jets, offering the best new and pre-owned jets for sale, plus you can read&nbsp;</em></span><a href="https://www.avbuyer.com/magazines/avbuyer" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank"><span style="color: rgb(44, 130, 201);"><em>AvBuyer magazine</em></span></a><span style="color: rgb(44, 130, 201);"><em>&nbsp;and our&nbsp;</em></span><a function renderReCaptchaalert_me()
{
$('#submit_alert_me').removeAttr('disabled');
(function () {
if ($('#submit_alert_me').length !== 0 ) {
grecaptcha.render('submit_alert_me', {
'sitekey': "6Ld6QigUAAAAABxtsBgzbJnOQStV7-jxIUSNsPae",
'callback': function (token) {
$('#submit_alert_me').closest('form').submit();
}
});

$('#submit_alert_me').trigger('itemInquirySubmitBtnState');
}
})();
}

{

$('#submit_alert_me2').closest('form').submit();
}
});

$('#submit_alert_me2').trigger('itemInquirySubmitBtnState');
}
})();
}

</script><script>
function loadYoutubeJs(){
var div, n,
v = document.getElementsByClassName("youtube-player");
for (n = 0; n < v.length; n++) {
if ($( v[n]).html() == '') {
div = document.createElement("div");
div.setAttribute("data-id", v[n].dataset.id);
div.innerHTML = labnolThumb(v[n].dataset.id);
div.onclick = labnolIframe;
v[n].appendChild(div);
}
}
$('.lazy_video').Lazy();
}

function labnolThumb(id) {
var thumb = '<picture class="lazy_video"><data-src srcset="https://i.ytimg.com/vi_webp/ID/maxresdefault.webp" type="image/webp"></data-src><data-src srcset="https://i.ytimg.com/vi/ID/maxresdefault.jpg" type="image/jpeg"></data-src><data-img src="https://i.ytimg.com/vi/ID/maxresdefault.jpg" /></picture>',
play = '<div class="play"></div>';
return thumb.replace("ID", id).replace("ID", id).replace("ID", id) + play;
}

function labnolIframe() {
var iframe = document.createElement("iframe");
var embed = "https://www.youtube.com/embed/ID?autoplay=1&mute=1";
iframe.setAttribute("src", embed.replace("ID", this.dataset.id));
iframe.setAttribute("frameborder", "0");
iframe.setAttribute("allowfullscreen", "1");
this.parentNode.replaceChild(iframe, this);
}
$(document).ready(function() {
loadYoutubeJs();
});
</script><script type="text/javascript">
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries, observer) => {
entries.forEach(entry => {
if (entry.isIntersecting) {
loadImages(entry.target, 1); // Strictly load 1 image per item initially
observer.unobserve(entry.target);
}
});
}, { rootMargin: "200px" });

function loadImages(slide, maxImages = 1) {
if (!slide) return;

// Get all images inside the current item
const pictures = slide.querySelectorAll(".img-cell picture");

// Ensure only 'maxImages' (1 initially) loads
pictures.forEach((picture, index) => {
if (index < maxImages) {
const img = picture.querySelector("img");
const sources = picture.querySelectorAll("source");

if (img && img.dataset.src) {
img.src = img.dataset.src;
img.removeAttribute("data-src");
}
sources.forEach(source => {
if (source.dataset.src) {
source.srcset = source.dataset.src;
source.removeAttribute("data-src");
}
});
}
});
}

function loadNextImage(slide) {
if (!slide) return;

// Get images that are still unloaded
const unloadedPictures = slide.querySelectorAll(".img-cell picture img[data-src]");

if (unloadedPictures.length > 0) {
const nextImg = unloadedPictures[0]; // Load only the next one
nextImg.src = nextImg.dataset.src;
nextImg.removeAttribute("data-src");

// Load sources inside <picture>
const sources = nextImg.closest("picture").querySelectorAll("source");
sources.forEach(source => {
if (source.dataset.src) {
source.srcset = source.dataset.src;
source.removeAttribute("data-src");
}
});
}
}

function loadInitialSlides(slick) {
const currentSlideIndex = slick.currentSlide || 0;

$('.slider-for .slick-slide').each(function (index) {
if (index === currentSlideIndex) {
loadImages(this, 1); // Load only 1 image for the first item
} else {
observer.observe(this); // Observer handles the rest on scroll
}
});
}

$('.slider-for').on('init', function (event, slick) {
setTimeout(() => loadInitialSlides(slick), 100); // Ensure Slick initializes first
}).slick({
initialSlide: 0,
slidesToShow: 1,
slidesToScroll: 1,
arrows: true,
dots: true,
fade: false,
lazyLoad: 'ondemand', // Ensure Slick doesn’t preload all images
infinite: false,
rows: 0,
});

$('.slider-for').on('afterChange', function (event, slick, currentSlide) {
const currentSlideEl = $('.slider-for .slick-slide').eq(currentSlide)[0];
loadNextImage(currentSlideEl); // Load only 1 new image per navigation
});
});


document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
const lazyContent = document.getElementById("avinodeApp");

// Function to dynamically load a script
const loadScript = (url) => {
return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
const script = document.createElement("script");
script.src = url;
script.type = "text/javascript";
script.async = true;

script.onload = () => {
resolve();
};
script.onerror = () => {
console.error(`Error loading ${url}`);
reject(new Error(`Script load error for ${url}`));
};

document.body.appendChild(script);
});
};

// Observer to detect when the content is in view
const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries, observer) => {
entries.forEach(entry => {
if (entry.isIntersecting) {
// Load third-party script when content becomes visible
loadScript("https://apps.avinode.com/webapp/rest/bootstrap?Avinode-WEB-APP=eyJraWQiOiIxNkVBQkQ5RS1BRjYyLTQ4NTEtODk5Qi1BM0UwMThGRjYxNDciLCJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJSUzUxMiJ9.eyJzdWIiOiI3MDJjMmRkZS1kYWMyLTQ3ZDAtYjNjOS02ZWM1MThlNWJkZmYiLCJhdmlkb21haW4iOiIuYXZpbm9kZS5jb20iLCJhdml0ZW5hbnQiOjExMzgwLCJpc3MiOiJhdmlub2RlIiwiYXZpdHlwZSI6MTAsImF2aW5vbmNlIjoiMTIyYTQxOGUtNjAyMS00NTYxLTliMDctZjM5YTllNzM4YWVkIn0.grYx3F0W_miFJ2NjbbdmAqEBg8oL0yukdeUIbageL_-2jewkcx6vsmG4kHZ0FshuyjH-8Vho5fSAArG9U3fQ1bYn7ZDA3t3vJp-mzhOaU3ryHKMksr2nROjAZilObNts_6RsyrQtbEBPJYgmCH9n9Skh3GbSkac9tKqjP7Ma_i0hx3SDHx889v4Q-pQHnUCguitkUbQsIPm-UNVDG-ci1qU16xURx1VvMDcaqy2wdumDt9A65QCj_BmYVBS13nRxbI1uegDG6SqLY5ACpoLVJeKdo37uibZS1c1VcF-hFHQ9jWpJbwO4Dbr5JK6zDfsPqBo_7wK0IQjgeKWGemOKEg&analyticsReferrer=https://www.flyingmag.com/")
.then(() => {
})
.catch((err) => {
console.error(err.message);
});

observer.unobserve(lazyContent); // Stop observing after loading
}
});
});

observer.observe(lazyContent);
});

</script><script language="javascript" type="text/javascript">

});

{
"@context": "https://schema.org",
"@graph": [
{
"@type": "Organization",
"name": "AvBuyer",
"legalName": "AvBuyer Ltd",

</script><script type="application/ld+json">
{
"@context": "https://schema.org",
"@graph": [
{
"@type": "FAQPage",
"mainEntity": [
{
"@type": "Question",
"name": "How much is a private Jet?",
"acceptedAnswer": {
"@type": "Answer",
"text": "In today's market most jets would fall into the range of between US$30 million and US$5 million. At the top end of the Large Jet market, a 2024-model Gulfstream G700 costs US$80.0m, per Aircraft Bluebook’s Summer 2024 data, whereas a 2023-model single-engine Cirrus SF50 Gen 2+ VisionJet in the Very Light Jet category costs US$3.5m. On the used aircraft market, there are various examples of older jets having depreciated to below $2m, and even less than $1m following several years of depreciation."
}
},
{
"@type": "Question",
"name": "How many private jets are there in the world today?",
"acceptedAnswer": {
"@type": "Answer",
"text": "There are 24,270 private jets in operation worldwide (JETNET, July 2024). Approximately 63% of the world’s private jets are registered in the United States."
}
},
{
"@type": "Question",
"name": "Are private jets more efficient than the airlines?",
"acceptedAnswer": {
"@type": "Answer",
"text": "Private jets access around 10 times more airports in the US than scheduled airlines (around 5000 airports versus 500 airports) giving them access to remote communities without airline service. Moreover, 38% of Business Aviation missions involve stopping at more than one destination, according to NBAA."
}
},
{
"@type": "Question",
"name": "How successful are private jet owners?",
"acceptedAnswer": {
"@type": "Answer",
"text": "Business aircraft users out-perform non-users by 23% in revenue growth.Two-thirds of passengers say they are more productive aboard their business jets than in the office."
}
}
]
}
]
}
</script><script type="application/ld+json">
